arts.ttl: Everton vs Peterborough – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Everton host Peterborough United in the last-ever FA Cup third-round tie at Goodison Park tonight. The Toffees announced in the hours before the game that manager Sean Dyche has been relieved of his duties.
